Grand Prix of Hungary   24/07-26/07/2026  (26R11BUD)
In agreement with the FIA and in accordance with Article B6.1.3 a) of the F1 Sporting Regulations, this document contains 
the prescriptions for the operation of tyres during the following event.
Issue ADocument version 5
Maximum heating times and temperatures (tread & sidewall)
Teams are kindly reminded that the following will be subject to FIA checks during the event:
•  Starting pressures
•  Cold pressures (according to the cold pressure cooling curves)
•  Re-heat pressures
•  EOS Camber
•  Maximum tyre temperatures and times in blankets
•  Tyre swapping
• Not permitted to
